textByHash.36475557bdfe5af6133f8bfd11071c51dad44c74: I don't remember. Everyone around here just calls me 'boy'.
textByHash.495e8b500430c1d58e4a87e30e7ee4146f280282: Yes. I served in the military for 30 years. This monument always reminds me of my days in the army.
textByHash.62ccca97a6800e67f3323903e482628cfea15e24: Wonderful, wonderful! Mother's coming to get me!
textByHash.7d4537d67ac394f2f59b266335a74f7f890c3077: Hello traveller, do you know what this is?
textByHash.982e052a9a822b7376fec9b72c9c3555033f71a2: My word - so it is!!! I never thought I would see it again!! Where did you get it from?
textByHash.a85f6645227503f74dcd9b27d6b6a3b8b18892bf: No no no - the captain's just waiting for the wind to change, then we're off!
textByHash.b045f1f919578a89acec2dbc3c0229b9d064a844: Shipwreck?!? Not shipwreck, surely not! Just in port, that's all!
textByHash.b251e3391c0b1c2952174e5158ae20c9c8c8260b: You must show more respect to the Captain.
textByHash.e1a7acb1ae83cea52fd948099cdb3947439bf0aa: No - I made a toy boat a long while ago, but the colours on the flag were different.
textByHash.e8d410c09f388c2a2878509069b8c45d214b43f1: Hang on, let me ask the Captain ...
textByHash.fc2725ce79d11f6fff5d462b4ed8c7e8f607af92: No - I made a toy boat a long while ago, but that one had a flag.
